General.Name: My Rewards International Ltd
General.Description: My Rewards International Limited provides employee benefit, rewards and recognition, employee engagement, loyalty program, and membership services to corporate and retail clients. It serves retailers and businesses. My Rewards International Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is based in St Kilda, Australia.
